meaning: adj.产生去甲肾上腺素的,去甲肾上腺素激活的
examples: OBJECTIVE: To study the effects of impairing the central noradrenergic system on rat's P3 like cognitive potential.
The effect of the central noradrenergic nerve on the intracerebral vessels and local cerebral circulation was discussed.
Conclusion Dysfunction or imbalance between noradrenergic and dopaminergic neurotransmitter systems might play an leading role in the pathophysiological mechanism of ADHD.
